titleStmt.title: SII 24.294: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 294. (A.R. No. 54 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: The record is unfinished. It gives the ancestry of the king Virūpāksha from Saṁgama and states that he was the son of Harihara by Mallambikā and the daughter's son of king Rāmadēva of the Yadukula. Mentions a visit of the king to the sage Vidyāraṇya. The inscription is in Sanskrit prose engraved in Grantha characters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: ti khalu jagati jagattalamahēndrasya candrakulakalaśa pārāvāra pārijātasya bhāṣātilaṅghirājanya bhujaṅgamāhiṣaṅga nibhasaṅgamādhirājasya saṅgamasantāna cintāmaṇē rarirāya vibhāḍasya pūrvapaścimadakṣiṇa samūdrādhīśvarasya saptama cakravarttinō varttamānarāja paramēśvarasya bukka rājasutō śrīhariharamahārājasya putraḥ pavitracāritrasya yadukulakamala ṣaṇḍamārttāṇḍasya vaidikamārggō kṣāgurō(ḥ)ścaturbhujā parāvatārasya dauhitrō rāmadēvarāyasyamallām
bi kā(ā)garbhaśuttimuttāmaṇiḥ karṇāṭa tuṇḍira cōḷa pāṇḍyamaṇḍalākhaṇḍala ssāgarā(m)ntaravartti sakalāntari pāvaskandisain

ya . sannāhakṛtakṛdviryya tanayaśauṇḍiryyalāghavōrāghavaḷava laṅkādvīpasthāpitajayastambhō viśva(śva)mbharābh(ā)raṇadhurīṇabāhu ṣṣōḍaśamahādānadīkṣitō rājā virūpākṣaḥ . sa kadācidapārasamsārasāgarantarāḷamajjanōnmajjanajanitamahōpadravannirūpya jantujāta

mā namānasamaparamiva śaṅkarācāryyam paramahamsaparivrājakācāryya mācāryyamātmanō vidyāraṇyam yatindramāsādyabhaktyāsāṣṭāṅga mabhyavandiṣṭa . vyabhāvayaccamahānubhāvasyāsya caraṇasarasīruhayugaḷavarivasa nādṛtē kathamāsādyatē mayā sadyastāpatrayāvalēpanirvā paṇasudhāvṛṣṭiravidyā vibhāvari vibhātavēlācaturvidhapumartthasiddhidāyi

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
